title: The Disproven Hypothesis
description: A player's theory about ingredient 1 was publicly debunked. What can you deduce from the card reader's result?

hints.text: A debunk clue works just like an aspect clue — the card reader always reveals the true sign, regardless of whether the theory was proved wrong or not.
The debunk showed ingredient 1 has G+. Combined with the sheet clue R−, you know two of its three aspects. Only one alchemical has both R− and G+.
R− and G+ pins ingredient 1 to nPp. Ingredient 2 is npN (given directly). Mix nPp + npN: the G aspects both have the same sign (+) but different sizes, so the result is G+.
